title: L2: Core Functions
description: SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, MAX and MIN for BTEC DIT Component 2 Task 2b.

steps.title: What Are Functions?
steps.content:
What are functions?

In Lesson 1 you wrote =B2*C2 to multiply two cells. But what if you need to add up 50 cells? You cannot write =A2+A3+A4+… all the way down. That is where functions come in — built-in recipes that perform common calculations for you.

The pattern is always:

=FUNCTION_NAME(range)

Example: =SUM(D2:D6)  —  D2:D6 means every cell from D2 to D6 inclusive.

Five functions you need for BTEC Component 2 Task 2b:

FunctionWhat it doesExample
SUMAdds all values in the range=SUM(D2:D6)
AVERAGEFinds the mean=AVERAGE(D2:D6)
COUNTCounts how many numbers are in the range=COUNT(D2:D6)
MAXFinds the highest value=MAX(D2:D6)
MINFinds the lowest value=MIN(D2:D6)
steps.js: createMCQSet('l2-intro-mcq',[{q:'What symbol must every function formula start with?',options:['=','+','@','#'],answer:0,right:'Correct — always start with =.'},{q:'What does the range D2:D6 include?',options:['All cells from D2 down to D6','Only D2 and D6','D2, D4 and D6 only','All of column D'],answer:0,right:'Correct — the colon means from...to inclusive.'},{q:'Which function adds up a list of numbers?',options:['SUM','COUNT','MAX','AVERAGE'],answer:0,right:'Correct — SUM adds them all up.'}]);

steps.title: SUM
steps.content:
SUM — adding up a column

=SUM(D2:D6) adds every value from D2 to D6 in one step — far quicker than typing =D2+D3+D4+D5+D6.

Worked example

ABCD
1ItemQtyPriceIncome
2–65 products…404.55 – 149.85
7TOTAL=SUM(D2:D6) → 1732.13

In D7, use the correct function to calculate the total Income for rows 2 to 6, then click Check.

Please refresh the page.');};document.head.appendChild(s);}lcss('assets/css/jsuites.css');lcss('assets/css/jspreadsheet.css');ljs('assets/js/jsuites.js',function(){ljs('assets/js/jspreadsheet.js',function(){ljs('assets/js/jspreadsheet-formula-bar.js?v=20',function(){var data=[["Item","Qty","Price (£)","Income (£)"],["Phone Cases",45,8.99,404.55],["Earphones",32,14.99,479.68],["Screen Protectors",67,4.99,334.33],["Chargers",28,12.99,363.72],["Phone Stands",15,9.99,149.85],["TOTAL","","",""]];var sheet=jspreadsheet(document.getElementById('l2-sum-sheet'),{data:data,columns:[{"width":150},{"width":60},{"width":100},{"width":110}],minDimensions:[4,7],tableOverflow:true,tableWidth:'100%',toolbar:false,about:false});JHNCCAddFormulaBar(document.getElementById('l2-sum-sheet'),sheet);JHNCCAddFormatToolbar(document.getElementById('l2-sum-sheet'),sheet);JHNCCAddSheetTabs(document.getElementById('l2-sum-sheet'),sheet);document.getElementById('l2-sum-check').onclick=function(){var fb=document.getElementById('l2-sum-fb');var raw=String(sheet.getValueFromCoords(3,6,false)||'');var val=parseFloat(sheet.getValueFromCoords(3,6,true));if(raw.charAt(0)!=='='){fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Click D7 and enter a formula that totals the Income values from rows 2 to 6.';return;}if(raw.toUpperCase().indexOf('SUM')===-1){fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Use the SUM function with the Income range from row 2 to row 6.';return;}if(Math.abs(val-1732.13)>0.1){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Total is not right — make sure your range is D2:D6.';return;}fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Correct! The total Income is 1732.13. One function replaces five addition signs.';__markStepComplete();};});});});})();

steps.title: AVERAGE
steps.content:
AVERAGE — finding the mean

=AVERAGE(D2:D6) adds all the values and divides by how many there are — giving the mean.

1732.13 ÷ 5 = 346.43 (to 2dp)

The total is already in D7. In D8, calculate the mean Income for rows 2 to 6, then click Check.

AVERAGE(D2:D6)=346.43. The mean income per product is £346.43.';__markStepComplete();};});});});})();

steps.title: MAX and MIN
steps.content:
MAX and MIN — highest and lowest

=MAX(D2:D6) returns the highest value; =MIN(D2:D6) returns the lowest. In BTEC these identify the best and worst performing products.

FunctionResultMeaning
=MAX(D2:D6)479.68Earphones — highest income
=MIN(D2:D6)149.85Phone Stands — lowest income

In D9, find the highest Income. In D10, find the lowest Income. Use the Income values from rows 2 to 6, then click Check.

steps.title: COUNT
steps.content:
COUNT — how many entries?

=COUNT(D2:D6) counts how many cells in the range contain a number. It tells you how many products, transactions, or entries are in your dataset.

=COUNT(D2:D6) → 5

Five numeric cells in D2:D6.

Note: COUNT only counts numbers. Cells containing text are ignored. Use COUNTA if you need to count text entries.

In D11, count how many numeric Income values are in rows 2 to 6, then click Check.

COUNT(D2:D6)=5. All five functions are now in your toolkit.';__markStepComplete();};});});});})();

steps.title: Full Practice
steps.content:
Full practice — five functions on a new dataset

Revenue values are in C2:C6. Add all five summary formulas in C7–C11.

RowLabel (col A)What column C should calculate
7TOTALAdd all revenue values
8AVERAGEFind the mean revenue
9MAXFind the highest revenue
10MINFind the lowest revenue
11COUNTCount the numeric revenue entries
steps.js: (function(){function lcss(u){if(!document.querySelector('link[href="'+u+'"]')){var l=document.createElement('link');l.rel='stylesheet';l.href=u;document.head.appendChild(l);}}function ljs(u,cb){var ex=document.querySelector('script[data-jhncc-src="'+u+'"]');if(ex){if(ex.getAttribute('data-loaded')==='1'){cb();}else{ex.addEventListener('load',function(){cb();});}return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.setAttribute('data-jhncc-src',u);s.src=u;s.onload=function(){s.setAttribute('data-loaded','1');cb();};s.onerror=function(){alert('The spreadsheet tool could not load. Please refresh the page.');};document.head.appendChild(s);}lcss('assets/css/jsuites.css');lcss('assets/css/jspreadsheet.css');ljs('assets/js/jsuites.js',function(){ljs('assets/js/jspreadsheet.js',function(){ljs('assets/js/jspreadsheet-formula-bar.js?v=20',function(){var data=[["Month","Units Sold","Revenue (£)"],["January",120,2400],["February",95,1900],["March",140,2800],["April",88,1760],["May",112,2240],["TOTAL","",""],["AVERAGE","",""],["MAX","",""],["MIN","",""],["COUNT","",""]];var sheet=jspreadsheet(document.getElementById('l2-full-sheet'),{data:data,columns:[{"width":130},{"width":100},{"width":130}],minDimensions:[3,11],tableOverflow:true,tableWidth:'100%',toolbar:false,about:false});JHNCCAddFormulaBar(document.getElementById('l2-full-sheet'),sheet);JHNCCAddFormatToolbar(document.getElementById('l2-full-sheet'),sheet);JHNCCAddSheetTabs(document.getElementById('l2-full-sheet'),sheet);document.getElementById('l2-full-check').onclick=function(){var fb=document.getElementById('l2-full-fb');var checks=[{row:6,fn:'SUM',exp:11100},{row:7,fn:'AVERAGE',exp:2220},{row:8,fn:'MAX',exp:2800},{row:9,fn:'MIN',exp:1760},{row:10,fn:'COUNT',exp:5}];var errors=[];checks.forEach(function(c){var raw=String(sheet.getValueFromCoords(2,c.row,false)||'');var val=parseFloat(sheet.getValueFromCoords(2,c.row,true));if(raw.charAt(0)!=='='||raw.toUpperCase().indexOf(c.fn)===-1){errors.push(c.fn+' missing in row '+(c.row+1));}else if(Math.abs(val-c.exp)>0.5){errors.push(c.fn+'='+val+' (expected '+c.exp+')');}});if(errors.length){fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Issues: '+errors.join(' | ');return;}fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='All five correct! SUM=11100, AVERAGE=2220, MAX=2800, MIN=1760, COUNT=5. Exactly what BTEC Task 2b requires.';__markStepComplete();};});});});})();

steps.title: Check What You Have Learned
steps.content:
Check what you have learned

Feedback appears after each question.
steps.js: createMCQSet('l2-exam',[{q:'Which formula adds all values from B2 to B10?',options:['=SUM(B2:B10)','=ADD(B2:B10)','=TOTAL(B2:B10)','=COUNT(B2:B10)'],answer:0,right:'Correct — SUM is the function name.'},{q:'=AVERAGE(C2:C6) gives 50. What does that mean?',options:['The mean of C2:C6 is 50','There are 50 cells','The highest value is 50','50 cells were counted'],answer:0,right:'Correct — AVERAGE finds the mean.'},{q:'What does =COUNT(A2:A20) return?',options:['How many numbers are in A2:A20','The sum of A2:A20','The highest number','The average'],answer:0,right:'Correct — COUNT counts numbers.'},{q:'=MAX(D2:D8) returns 320. What does this mean?',options:['320 is the highest value','320 is the sum','There are 320 cells','The average is 320'],answer:0,right:'Correct — MAX finds the highest.'},{q:'Which formula finds the lowest income in D2:D6?',options:['=MIN(D2:D6)','=LOW(D2:D6)','=MIN(D2,D6)','=LOWEST(D2:D6)'],answer:0,right:'Correct — MIN with a colon for the range.'},{q:'What does the colon mean in =SUM(B2:B6)?',options:['From B2 to B6 inclusive','Only B2 and B6','B2 divided by B6','B2 multiplied by B6'],answer:0,right:'Correct — the colon means from...to.'}]);

steps.title: Endless Practice
steps.content:
Endless practice

Answer 5 in a row to finish. A wrong answer resets the streak.
steps.js:
(function(){var bank=[{q:'Income in D2:D10. Formula for the total?',o:['=SUM(D2:D10)','=ADD(D2:D10)','=TOTAL(D2:D10)','=COUNT(D2:D10)'],a:0},{q:'Scores in C2:C30. Formula for the mean?',o:['=AVERAGE(C2:C30)','=MEAN(C2:C30)','=SUM(C2:C30)','=AVG(C2:C30)'],a:0},{q:'Sales in B2:B8. Formula for the highest value?',o:['=MAX(B2:B8)','=HIGH(B2:B8)','=MIN(B2:B8)','=TOP(B2:B8)'],a:0},{q:'Salaries in E2:E50. Formula for the lowest?',o:['=MIN(E2:E50)','=MAX(E2:E50)','=LOW(E2:E50)','=BOTTOM(E2:E50)'],a:0},{q:'How do you count how many numbers are in A1:A20?',o:['=COUNT(A1:A20)','=SUM(A1:A20)','=AVERAGE(A1:A20)','=MAX(A1:A20)'],a:0},{q:'Values: 100,200,150,300,250. What does =MAX(C2:C6) return?',o:['300','250','150','200'],a:0},{q:'Values: 100,200,150,300,250. What does =MIN(C2:C6) return?',o:['100','150','200','250'],a:0},{q:'Income in F2:F15. Formula for the average?',o:['=AVERAGE(F2:F15)','=SUM(F2:F15)/15','=MEAN(F2:F15)','=AVG(F2:F15)'],a:0}];var solved=0,c=document.getElementById('l2-endless');function pick(){return bank[Math.floor(Math.random()*bank.length)];}function render(){var q=pick();var opts=q.o.map(function(x,i){return{x:x,i:i};}).sort(function(){return Math.random()-0.5;});c.innerHTML='

Correct in a row: '+solved+' / 5

'+q.q+'

'+opts.map(function(o){return '';}).join('')+'
';c.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(function(btn){btn.onclick=function(){var fb=c.querySelector('.ex-feedback');if(parseInt(btn.dataset.i)===q.a){solved++;fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent=solved>=5?'Practice complete! Well done.':'Correct! Next question.';if(solved>=5)__markStepComplete();else setTimeout(render,700);}else{solved=0;fb.className='ex-feedback err';fb.textContent='Not quite — streak reset. Try again.';setTimeout(render,1100);}};});} render();})();

quizQuestions.q: Which function adds all numbers in a range?

options: Every cell from D2 to D6 inclusive

quizQuestions.q: In D7, calculate the total Income for D2:D6 using the appropriate spreadsheet function.
In D8, calculate the mean Income for D2:D6 using the appropriate spreadsheet function.
Which function counts how many numeric cells are in a range?
In D9 and D10, calculate the highest and lowest Income values from D2:D6.
In D11, count how many numeric Income entries there are in D2:D6.
Which formula finds the lowest value in C2:C6?
